data.title: brainstorm:complete tag writer at Phase 3 completion
data.description:
As a practitioner running /dso:brainstorm, I want Phase 3 to write a durable ticket-level tag so that downstream tools can detect brainstorm completion without relying on the session-scoped sentinel file.

## Done Definition
- brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3 includes a new tag-write step between Step 3 (Validate Ticket Health) and Step 3b (Write Sentinel)
- Step reads current tags via `ticket show <epic-id>`, removes `scrutiny:pending` if present, adds `brainstorm:complete`, writes the merged list via `ticket edit --tags=<merged>` (read-merge-write)
- Existing tags on the epic (e.g., `design:approved`, `CLI_user`) are preserved after the edit
- Fixture test: epic with existing tags receives `brainstorm:complete`, has `scrutiny:pending` removed if present, and retains all other tags

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Pattern mirrors plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh (existing read-merge-write example in the codebase)
- [Testing] Behavioral test: assert tag state after running Phase 3 through a fixture harness; do NOT mechanically grep SKILL.md content

## Escalation Policy
Escalate when blocked — agents proceed unless a significant assumption is required that could misdirect implementation. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. All assumptions made without escalating are documented.
